author: lOrm
content:
Forensic verification: all 11 Option .map().unwrap_or_else() sites (plus the 3 Result and 3 Option .map().unwrap_or(v) sites) listed in this issue have already been refactored to map_or_else/map_or in prior commits.

Evidence:
- cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features --message-format=json 2>&1 | grep -c map_unwrap_or  --> 0 hits.
- grep -rn map_or_else src/ tests/ | wc -l --> 74 call sites (refactor landed).
- Cargo.toml has pedantic = deny at workspace level; map_unwrap_or is in clippy::pedantic, so any remaining site would be a build error. Current clippy run produces only 3 unrelated doc_markdown errors in src/plugins/mod.rs.
- Test baseline: 1283 passed, 0 failed (baseline 1277; suite grew by 6 since issue filed).

Per-site mapping (issue location --> current location, all map_or_else/map_or):
- src/pipeline.rs:260,265,270 (Option.map().unwrap_or(v)) --> pipeline.rs:270 map_or_else, 272 map_or_else, 330/334 map_or
- src/pipeline.rs:379 --> restructured; pattern no longer present
- src/pipeline.rs:789,794,799,804,816,821,826,831 (permission-result cluster) --> permission handling rewritten to match/PermissionOutcome enum (lines 780-840); no .map().unwrap_or_else() remains
- src/tui/app.rs:1386 --> app.rs:1609 map_or_else
- src/vdd/mod.rs:923 --> vdd module split; sinks in vdd/sink.rs:37, vdd/prompts.rs:172, vdd/engine.rs:331/420, vdd/triage.rs:239 all map_or_else
- src/auto_learn.rs:511 --> auto_learn.rs:512 map_or_else
- src/tui/app.rs:1711 --> app.rs:1723 map_or_else
- src/tui/mod.rs:812 --> tui/mod.rs:872 map_or_else

No #[allow(clippy::map_unwrap_or)], no clippy.toml, no #[ignore] added. No new edits required; closing as already-fixed.
